title: 6/7/20 Turn comments back on YouTube! FOR KIDS

transcript.text: I'm living in Boulder, V-Log, June 8th, 2020, Monday.
Oops.
9.41 p.m. Monday on June 8th, 2020.
It's like I'm sweating because I've been eating candy.
I've been buying way too much candy.
I need to, like, stop it.
I've been getting fat.
You fucked it up.
Big old fatty.
Anyway.

And then today, got up at regular time, I guess.
Maybe late.
Can't remember early.
Can't remember.
Working a little bit.
Then I think, I called my mother because I call her every day because she broke two bones in her hand the other day.
Falled down.
And so, yeah, I went over there and I made her breakfast.
I made an omelet.
It was really good.
She liked my omelet.

And she said, make me omelet.
And she went upstairs.

And she goes, well, if you want to put some.

She's like, fine.
So, I cut up the entire tomato and I threw that in.
So, it's pretty good.
Made it juicy.
And then I took her to the hair salon to do hair styling.
